story.text:
# 0xagentprivacy — Skill Library

Welcome. The federated home of the **agentprivacy** persona cast and the skills they carry, published as forkable wiki pages. Each page is a git-less clone target: fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`. Source of truth: `agentprivacy-skills-v5`.

## Personas by register (42)

- 🧙 [[Mage Personas]] (15) — the **D** wing — delegation: projection, compression, governance, ceremony.
- 🗡️ [[Swordsman Personas]] (15) — the **P** wing — protection: boundaries, forging, sentinels, amnesia.
- ☯️ [[Balanced Personas]] (12) — quaternion-symmetric — walking the complement-edges between registers.

## Skill categories (123)

- 🛠️ [[Role Skills]] (67) — the functional skills a persona carries — economics, governance, cryptography, ceremony, defense.
- 🔐 [[Privacy Layer Skills]] (20) — the substrate: the lattice, the dragon, promise theory, content-addressing, the bounds.
- 🧬 [[Meta Skills]] (8) — how the system composes itself — attachment architecture, dualities, the harness, the gates.
- 🗃️ [[The Wikis]] (28) — the Librarian's shelves — fedwiki onboarding + git-less distribution skills.

## The map

- 🗺️ [[Agentprivacy Mapping]] — the full migration map (every folder, the structure, the equation terms).

---
*165 skill/persona pages · 3 register hubs · 4 category hubs · origin: 0xagentprivacy · author: Mitchell Travers*

## 👪 The agentprivacy family

Five sister sites, one federation. Click a flag to cross over, or **»** to pull the whole family into your neighbourhood.

Hub
